title: Assertion failure with complex subquery in selectlist
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE product (product_id INT NOT NULL, product_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, category_id INT NOT NULL, price REAL NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT product_pk PRIMARY KEY (product_id));
CREATE TABLE category (category_id INT NOT NULL, category_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT category_pk PRIMARY KEY (category_id));
INSERT INTO product (product_id, product_name, category_id, price, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Smartphone', 1, 699.99, NOW());

SELECT c.category_name, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price, (SELECT MAX(p2.price) FROM product p2 WHERE p2.category_id = c.category_id) AS max_price FROM category c LEFT JOIN product p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.category_name;
key_bug_features: Assertion failure with complex subquery in selectlist
